data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the requirement for no-show prediction.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'No-show prediction' but did not provide concrete evidence to confirm its implementation or functionality. The linked use case outlines the need for historical no-show rates and a prediction mechanism, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any API endpoints or data that would validate this requirement. As a result, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to the conclusion that the validation is inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of implemented no-show prediction mechanism or historical no-show data.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for no-show prediction
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and accuracy of no-show prediction based on historical data.
